data.title: Scallop Identifies Vulnerability in sSUI Reward Pool Contract
data.description: Scallop, a lending protocol within the Sui ecosystem, has reported a vulnerability in an affiliate contract related to its sSUI reward pool, resulting in a loss of approximately 150,000 SUI. According to ChainCatcher, the affected contract has been frozen to prevent further issues. Scallop assures that its core contracts remain secure and that only the sSUI reward pool was impacted, with all other reward pools remaining unaffected. The company has committed to covering 100% of the losses and will provide further updates soon.

data.title: Hyperliquid Platform Whale Positions Reach $3.51 Billion
data.description:
According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass reveals that a whale on the Hyperliquid platform currently holds positions worth $3.51 billion. The long positions amount to $1.77 billion, representing 50.56% of the total, while short positions are valued at $1.73 billion, accounting for 49.44%. The long positions have incurred a loss of $8.52 million, whereas the short positions have a loss of $21.55 million.

Notably, a whale address, 0x0ddf..02, has taken a 3x leveraged short position on Bitcoin at a price of $67,992.10, resulting in an unrealized loss of $9.81 million.

data.title: Iranian official: Ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz must pay a fee.
data.description: On April 26 local time, Aziz, chairman of the National Security and Foreign Policy Committee of the Iranian Islamic Parliament, stated in an interview that all ships wishing to pass through the Strait of Hormuz must pay a fee. He also stated that the Strait of Hormuz has become one of the important pillars of Iran's power. (CCTV)

data.title: DoorDash Collaborates with Tempo for Stablecoin Payouts
data.description: DoorDash is partnering with Stripe-backed Tempo to integrate stablecoin-powered payouts into its marketplace, spanning over 40 countries. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration involves DoorDash, Stripe, Coastal Bank, and ARQ, aiming to introduce stablecoin payments. Andy Fang highlighted that the primary attraction for DoorDash is the faster and more affordable payout system offered by stablecoins.

data.title: AI TRENDS | Endless Toil Plugin Adds Sound Effects to Code Reading
data.description: Andrew Vos has introduced a new GitHub plugin named Endless Toil, which enhances the coding experience by adding sound effects as AI models like Claude or Codex read code. According to NS3.AI, the plugin features three distinct sound levels: groan, wail, and abyss, providing an auditory dimension to the coding process.

data.title: Kevin Warsh's Confirmation Hearing Approaches Amid Crypto Investment Disclosures
data.description: Jeanine Pirro announced the closure of the criminal investigation into Jerome Powell, coinciding with Kevin Warsh's upcoming confirmation hearing. According to NS3.AI, Warsh recently stated that Bitcoin and cryptocurrencies are already integrated into U.S. financial services. His financial disclosures revealed several investments related to the crypto sector.

data.title: White House Urged to Expedite Construction of Secure Banquet Hall
data.description: On April 26, Jin10 reported that recent events have underscored the necessity for a large, secure, and reliable banquet hall within the White House grounds, a feature requested by every president over the past 150 years for various reasons. If the military-grade banquet hall currently under construction at the White House had been completed, such incidents would not occur. The hall must be completed swiftly, as it is not only aesthetically pleasing but also equipped with top-level security measures, without rooms accessible to unauthorized personnel. It is located within the walls of the world's most secure building—the White House. A lawsuit filed by a 'dog-walking woman,' who lacks the standing to bring such a case, must be dismissed immediately. Nothing should interfere with the construction process—the project is not only within budget but also ahead of schedule.

data.title: The suspect in the White House Correspondents' Club dinner security incident will be charged on the 27th.
data.description: On April 26 local time, Acting U.S. Attorney General Todd Branch stated that a search warrant had been executed for the suspect in the White House Correspondents' Association dinner security incident, and that the suspect believed he traveled from Los Angeles to Washington, D.C. by train via Chicago. Branch stated that the suspect will be charged in federal court on the morning of April 27. Branch said the gunman at the White House Correspondents' Association dinner "intended to attack government staff, most likely including the president himself." Branch stated that investigators have been able to gather information from the suspect's electronic devices and have interviewed several people who know him, and they are beginning to understand his motives. (CCTV)

data.title: Expert Predicts XRP Surge to $140 Amid Ripple's Growing Bank Interest
data.description: Crypto analyst Amonyx has shared a long-term monthly chart for XRP, projecting a potential rise to $140, compared to its current price of approximately $1.40. According to NS3.AI, this optimistic forecast comes as Ripple experiences increased interest from U.S. banks. Ripple CEO Monica Long stated that the company is now receiving numerous requests for proposals from U.S. banks seeking custody products.

data.title: Elon Musk Announces Imminent Launch of X Money with Cash Back and Interest Benefits
data.description: Elon Musk has announced that X is on the verge of launching X Money, a new banking and payments tool. According to NS3.AI, early testers of the service have reported benefits such as 3% cash back and 6% interest on cash savings. Musk has committed to making the service available to the public this month, with early public access anticipated soon.

data.title: Asia's Crypto Developments: Singapore Eases Rules, Thailand Expands Derivatives
data.description:
This week's roundup focuses on significant developments in the Asian cryptocurrency landscape. According to NS3.AI, Singapore has taken steps to ease regulations on public chain assets, aiming to foster a more conducive environment for blockchain innovation. Meanwhile, Thailand has opened its doors to digital asset derivatives, marking a significant expansion in its financial offerings.

In addition to these developments, Uzbekistan, Russia, and the Philippines have also made notable policy moves in the crypto sector. These changes reflect a broader trend of regulatory adjustments across Asia, as countries seek to balance innovation with oversight in the rapidly evolving digital asset space.

data.title: Galaxy Digital CEO Predicts U.S. CLARITY Act Finalization by June
data.description: Galaxy Digital CEO Mike Novogratz has expressed optimism about the U.S. CLARITY Act, suggesting it could be finalized in May and signed into law by June. According to NS3.AI, Novogratz's comments highlight the potential for regulatory clarity in the cryptocurrency sector. Galaxy's head of research, Alex Thorn, estimated a 50% chance of the bill's passage in 2026, noting that the odds could decrease if the legislation does not progress by mid-May.

data.title: Upcoming Token Unlocks for SUI, JUP, and SIGN
data.description: According to PANews, data from Token Unlocks indicates that several tokens, including SUI, JUP, and SIGN, are set for significant unlocks next week. Sui (SUI) will unlock approximately 42.62 million tokens at 8:00 AM UTC+8 on May 1, representing about 1.08% of its circulating supply, valued at around $40 million. Jupiter (JUP) will unlock approximately 53.47 million tokens at 10:00 PM UTC+8 on April 28, accounting for about 1.53% of its circulating supply, with a value of approximately $9.2 million. Sign (SIGN) will unlock approximately 401 million tokens at 6:00 PM UTC+8 on April 28, which is about 20.78% of its circulating supply, valued at around $7 million. EigenCloud (EIGEN) will also have a token unlock on May 1 at 12:00 PM UTC+8.

data.title: Elon Musk Nears Launch of Financial Services Tool on Twitter
data.description: Elon Musk is approaching his long-term objective of transforming Twitter into an 'everything app.' According to Bloomberg, Musk plans to introduce a new financial services tool for public use this month. This development comes more than three years after Musk acquired Twitter, marking a significant step towards his vision for the platform.

data.title: An address withdrew 219,000 LINK tokens from Binance, worth approximately $2.08 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, an address withdrew 219,000 LINK tokens from Binance, worth approximately $2.08 million, and currently holds 785,000 LINK tokens, worth approximately $7.43 million.

data.title: Significant LINK Withdrawal from CEX Address Observed
data.description: On April 26, a notable transaction was detected involving the address '0x527'. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, this address withdrew 219,342 LINK tokens from a centralized exchange (CEX), valued at $2.08 million. Currently, the address holds a total of 784,954 LINK tokens, with an estimated value of $7.43 million.

data.title: Iran and Oman Discuss Security in Strait of Hormuz
data.description: Iran's foreign minister met with the Sultan of Oman to discuss security and safe passage in the Strait of Hormuz. According to NS3.AI, the Iranian Foreign Ministry stated that the discussions also included broader regional security issues.

data.title: Germany Explores Options for Commerzbank Amid UniCredit Concerns
data.description: Germany has been actively seeking potential partners for Commerzbank in an effort to counter interest from UniCredit. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the country's strategic moves earlier this year to secure Commerzbank's future. The initiative underscores Germany's determination to maintain control over its banking sector and prevent foreign acquisition. Commerzbank, one of Germany's major financial institutions, has been at the center of these discussions as the government aims to safeguard its interests. The search for suitable partners reflects the broader challenges faced by European banks in a competitive global market.

data.title: El Salvador Increases Bitcoin Holdings by 31 BTC Over Past Month
data.description: El Salvador has increased its Bitcoin holdings by 31 BTC over the past 30 days, according to ChainCatcher. The country's total Bitcoin reserves now stand at 7,633.37 BTC. The value of these holdings is approximately $624 million.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Calls for Regional Security Mechanism
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has emphasized the need for regional countries to establish a collective security mechanism free from U.S. intervention. According to Odaily, Araghchi highlighted the importance of cooperation among neighboring nations to ensure stability and security in the region.
